results.diagnosis: Scanner false-positive. Underlying nightly-tracker-audit job genuinely succeeded (exit 0, validator PASSED, clean state 3 consecutive nights 5/13-5/15). scan_launchd_failures.py VALIDATOR_FAIL_RE=r'VALIDATOR FAILED' (lines 83/98) substring-matches the skill's own success-summary negation prose 'No STOP marker, no `VALIDATOR FAILED`.' Recommended fix: anchor regex to the real wrapper marker 'VALIDATOR FAILED — overriding skill exit code' (full line/marker) instead of bare substring. No re-run performed (job already succeeded; re-run prohibited and pointless).
results.slack_text: launchd-debugger: nightly-tracker-audit FALSE-POSITIVE - underlying job SUCCEEDED (exit 0, validator PASSED, clean state for 3 consecutive nights). Scanner mis-flagged it: the VALIDATOR-FAILED detection regex in scan_launchd_failures.py (lines 83/98) substring-matches the skill's own success-summary negation phrase (No STOP marker, no VALIDATOR FAILED). Recommended: anchor the regex to the real wrapper marker 'VALIDATOR FAILED - overriding skill exit code' instead of the bare substring. No re-run needed. Log: logs/scheduled/nightly-tracker-audit-2026-05-15-2330.log
